creator: daria.kobtseva@corp.ovh.com
text:
Created attachment 203590
svn diff for /usr/ports/net/cloud-init

Hello everyone, 

Here is a patch to update cloud-init to version 18.5 which the latest. 
Only PORTVERSION number have to be updated and PORTREVISION deleted.

Tested on FreeBSD/amd64 12.0. 

(Proposed patch is a svn diff from /usr/ports)
